finding: Spatial-LT registration initially failed because OXE config/mixture/transform still only exposed Core-LT; fixed and dry-run passed with 152 episodes.
Dataset-aware manifest counts and manifest-sourced negative instructions are required; Core-LT hardcoded task counts and object_swap negatives are invalid for Spatial-LT.
Naive full-run RBTAD and TCAD-only underperform baseline on Spatial-LT; relation-only shifts make after-grasp counterfactuals noisy.
Full task-balanced and tempered replay damage broad spatial competence; replay branch rejected for this protocol.
Baseline-anchored TCAD-only correction reaches only 0.18 on 10-trial Spatial-LT; standalone TCAD is not sufficient.
RSDF vision+LLM alpha=0.5 reaches 0.31 in 10-trial screening, suggesting relation correction is useful when projector drift is avoided.
Matched 30-trial confirmation: baseline 0.19 vs RSDF vision+LLM 0.25, an absolute +0.06 gain under the same Spatial-LT protocol.
Updated and compiled the manuscript with Spatial-LT RSDF matched 30-trial results; tracked PDF now contains baseline 19.0% and RSDF 25.0%.

Launched seed13 RSDF matched confirmation watcher on server23. It waits until physical GPUs 2/3 are both below 2GB and low-utilization, then runs baseline-1000, BARC-p100, RSDF vision+LLM, and matched 30-trial baseline/RSDF evaluation.

Seed13 matched 30-trial confirmation weakens RSDF: baseline 0.17 vs RSDF 0.18 (+0.01), while seed7 was 0.19 vs 0.25 (+0.06). RSDF contains useful relation-correction signal but is not reliable enough for the +5-point goal.

SPRC full-parameter L2-SP protected correction failed on Spatial-LT 10-trial screening: seed7 0.17, seed13 0.13. Full-model weight anchoring does not solve the stability-plasticity issue; correction sample eligibility is the next structural bottleneck.

Launched CGRBC screening on server23 using only physical GPUs 2/3. Seed7 5-step smoke passed: tcad-debug active_count>0 and weighted_count=1 on a corrective tail batch, confirming confusion-gated rare BC is active. Remote log: /mnt/data/cyh/spatial_lt_cgrbc_screen_20260719_030410.log; estimated finish around 2026-07-19T04:35+08:00.
CGRBC confusion-gated rare BC is unstable on Spatial-LT: seed7 0.26 but seed13 0.10 under 10 trials/task. Debug confirms TCAD/tail gate is active, so the failure is not a plumbing issue.
CGRBC 5-step pulse gives seed7 0.19 and seed13 0.13 under 10 trials/task. Very short corrective training avoids a seed7 collapse but does not produce a reliable lift.

RLCT LLM-only relation-localized correction gives seed7 0.17 and seed13 0.18 under 10 trials/task. It recovers seed13 relative to CGRBC but loses seed7, so module freezing is not the right structural solution.
Pivot to behavior-preserving corrective distillation/action-space preservation. The repeated failure mode is baseline policy damage during relation correction, not lack of extra modules.

Red-team review identified the main BPCD risk: preserving baseline behavior on relation-confused states can lock in the baseline error. Blue-team review confirmed the minimal code path is the existing TCAD loss block in base_strategy.py.

Launched NB-TCAD on server23 using GPUs 2/3 only. The method detaches the positive TCAD score, so corrective gradients suppress the counterfactual negative branch while BC preserves the correct-instruction action path. Seed7 5-step smoke passed with active_count>0, tail_hit_count>0, detach_positive=1.
NB-TCAD completed on Spatial-LT 10-trial screening: seed7 0.16 and seed13 0.15, below matched BC baselines 0.19 and 0.17. The method is rejected.

NB-TCAD debug shows detach_positive=1 and TCAD/tail plumbing active, but tcad_loss is almost always zero. Offline expert-state positive-vs-negative action margins are mostly already satisfied, so the current failure likely lies in rollout-state relation binding rather than teacher-forced action scoring.

Rollout diagnostic on baseline seed7 with 2 trials/task produced 20 episodes, 2 successes, overall 0.10. Failures usually ran to max horizon, had delayed/no gripper close, and lower mean action norm (failure mean 0.4986 vs success mean 0.7904), pointing to closed-loop tail action commitment rather than offline TCAD margin failure.

Launched Tail-Focal BC screening on server23 using only physical GPUs 2/3. Seed7 5-step smoke passed: tail_hit_count values 1/5/3/4/2 and finite positive tail_focal_loss values 0.067801..2.510604. Remote log: /mnt/data/cyh/spatial_lt_tail_focal_screen_20260719_091114.log.
